textByHashes.348aa506dcf24cd5409cd937991553dedb83fc61: I could do with... another drink.
textByHashes.7bfeedbe1a6ff87afeac15feee52b9b0b7a5a892: Alcoholic? I'll have you know that I, Pavo, am most certainly not an alcoholic. Now scram.
textByHashes.51fbcfb727eec58cab320d411365760ab432cf61: Did you get that drink I asked for?
textByHashes.20e021108c9c0a0cd629e822efc46e3c1b217a38: That's my mistake. I'll take some wine... Preferably a barrel of it.
textByHashes.b64bfe1c7bc72df845719f36a9fea0a2ec2b410e: You know, it's a surprisingly sobering moment when someone's murdered beneath your feet.
textByHashes.6e5ee9392e59681c1d28ea5680764d133e19d69d: We were once drinking fellows. The things I've seen him drink without even breaking a sweat...
textByHashes.b5f5dd52783e78c712c4e051a864e20c1f83b51e: I don't remember... It seems likely that I would've though. He never liked to prepare for a performance without at least a small drink.
textByHashes.c3534a50dddf15d59af91df78736637ed6c8132d: Probably down in the cellar. That was always where he preferred to go.
textByHashes.c62e83c7cd65b681e318c65a712f8f90d8ebd1f8: I'd like to think that I would remember something so terrible happening in front of my eyes.
textByHashes.bdcd3f9652860eea36062284a121a9e53f2d10bb: Oh, that's a good point... In that case, I don't know...
textByHashes.2d16634d00b8bc7c64f3b32d5cc0fd0305058136: On occasion, a little too heavily.
textByHashes.60dfa6708a4affa00731d5a6aa5b6d230d94dd4d: We'd tend to bring our own, although I did sometimes let him have a bit extra from my flask.
textByHashes.77a446f850244a50619a146be0313101a62bfe69: Yes, that's the one! I must've misplaced it.
textByHashes.2a2a0b6d896a74bcf5e8c015ea0a9369176924bb: But why would I poison a friend?
textByHashes.6a678364fadeb61779c33c0f44ed2ea150f4485d: I would never do something like that! You have no proof!
textByHashes.697f5f48070151984ce8d5763020b0ca3ae4e370: Haven't you already tried to accuse me?
textByHashes.a54f93b9026a52ff227025b19494923ee7872a0a: Well that was a twist, wasn't it?
